CodeGraph.reason: Adopt as an opt-in Ola worker with verified assets and a staged rollout.

Hooks.reason: Adopt only after permission policy, with hash-bound trust and local execution defaults.

SSH.reason: Reuse modular state and management capabilities inside the Ola remote workbench.

Agent.reason: Review runtime, history, permissions, retries, drafts, and execution UX as vertical slices.

Media.reason: Defer video generation until the Ola product roadmap explicitly requires it.

Distribution.reason: Adopt asset integrity and updater improvements while preserving Ola packaging and channels.

Other.reason: Requires an explicit capability review before adoption.
